title: Contract Project Manager – Civil Engineering / Highways
description_raw:
Glenigan Recruitment are looking for an experienced Contract Project Manager to join a leading highways contractor on a major road improvement scheme in Greater London. The programme is funded under the National Highways Major Works programme.

This is a purely civil engineering PM role — the scope covers earthworks, pavement construction, drainage, and geotechnical work. There is no mechanical or building services element.

Role overview:
- Lead the delivery of a £25m Section 278 highway improvement scheme from pre-construction through to completion and 12-month defects period
- Manage the earthworks and pavement subcontract packages
- Administer the NEC4 ECC Option A contract with the local highway authority client
- Oversee Temporary Traffic Management (TTM) compliance and safety reviews
- Report monthly to the Project Director and Highways England Framework Manager

Profile:
- Civil engineering degree (BEng/MEng)
- 8+ years’ highways project management experience
- Chartered Civil Engineer (MICE or MCIHT)
- NEC4 ECC contract administration experience
- CSCS Black Card mandatory; SMSTS required

Rate: £650 per day (outside IR35)
Duration: 10 months
Start: 3 August 2026
Location: Greater London (various sites across Outer London; driving licence essential)
